capture_method: curl -sfL --user-agent "cdo-preserve/1.0" "<CDX query>" ; one JSON row per line
notes: Wayback CDX enumeration of all 2224 distinct archived TapTools /charts/* URLs (2047 per-token pages, 54 per-NFT-collection pages, plus grid roots) as of capture date. This is the historical-project-metadata INDEX: each row (timestamp,original,digest,mimetype) lets any researcher fetch or Save-Page-Now-pin the corresponding Wayback snapshot. Per scope discipline, the per-asset chart pages themselves (trader-tooling surfaces) are enumerated here but not mirrored; only the ranking-grid roots under rankings/ are mirrored. wayback_url is null because a CDX enumeration is not a single immutable snapshot (the result set grows as Wayback ingests new captures); verification is by local SHA-256 of this frozen enumeration.
